name: AgentsMesh
description: The AI Agent Workforce Platform. Run a hundred AI coding agents across your own machines — schedule, isolate, and steer them all from one console.
summaryZh: The AI Agent Workforce Platform. Run a hundred AI coding agents across your own machines — schedule, isolate, and steer them all from one console. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
